stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Given the significant weather chart attached, what hazards can be expected above Perth (32°S 116°E)?

options.a: No significant flight hazards, only a jet stream will be visible over Perth.
options.b: Moderate turbulence above FL310 due to the jet stream.
options.c: Severe turbulence at FL310 in the core of the jet stream.
options.d: Moderate turbulence at FL350, above the height of the jet stream.
